method: Loaded dwg_graph_ir.json, filtered entities where space=='model' (all 375 entities were model space), collected set of dxf_name values, counted distinct values.
commands: d = json.load(open(p, encoding='utf-8')); ents = d['entities']; print(type(ents), len(ents))
spaces = set(e.get('space') for e in ents); print(spaces)
model_ents = [e for e in ents if e.get('space')=='model']; print(len(model_ents))
names = set(e.get('dxf_name') for e in model_ents); print(len(names), sorted(names))
